{{Quote|Please do take in the sights of Nexus City historic district. I would be most honorated to take you on a private tour.|[[Begas Tok]] to [[Reina Gale]]|<ref name="It's a Gambler's Life">{{JournalCite|4|It's a Gambler's Life}}</ref>}}
'''Nexus City''' was the capital of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]].

==History==
Nexus City was the main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of the planet. Within the city was the famous historic district and a seedy industrial zone known as the [[Overhang]], where little sunlight penetrated the dense buildings.

==History==
In the years following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Reina Gale]] and [[Rollos]] went to Nexus City in order to sell [[Zipthar hexa-crystal]]s to [[Begas Tok]]. The deal was made despite the intervention of the [[Pentastar Patrol]].
